name: Januarius and companions
Theodore of Pergia
troparia: (Tone 3) Anointed by myrrh of priesthood, you were shepherds of God-minded people.* You were slain like blameless rams* and offered to Word, the chief Shepherd, Who was slain as a lamb,* O all-praised hieromartyrs.* Therefore we venerate your holy memory with love,** as you pray for our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 3) O Januarius and Theodore,* you were decorated with the ointment of priesthood and the blood of martyrdom,* and you shine everywhere, while rejoicing on high,* so look out for us who came to your temple and ceaselessly call out to you:** guard all of us by your prayers to God the Lover of mankind.
